# files_siem_http_destination_event (Data Source)

A SiemHttpDestinationEvent is a log record for SIEM publishing failures and recoveries.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "files_siem_http_destination_event" "example_siem_http_destination_event" {
  id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) Event ID

### Read-Only

- `body` (String) Event body.
- `body_url` (String) Link to log file.
- `created_at` (String) Event create date/time.
- `event_errors` (List of String) Event errors.
- `event_type` (String) Type of SIEM event being recorded.
- `siem_http_destination_id` (Number) SIEM ID.
- `status` (String) Status of event.
